dialogueChunks.intro: The hunt is over, {player_name}. You managed to {quest_action}, and {quest_threat_the} will not trouble us again.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_focus_The} {quest_focus_has} been recovered, and {quest_stakes_the} {quest_stakes_is} secure once more. {quest_ally} is already spreading the word.
dialogueChunks.outro: Your persistence made all the difference. Few would have followed this trail to the end.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, you did what no one else could. {quest_threat_The} {quest_threat_has} been dealt with, and {quest_focus_the} is back where it belongs.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I must admit, when the trail went cold I thought we had lost. But you kept going. You are owed more than I can express for saving {quest_stakes_the}.
dialogueChunks.outro: You have earned a reputation here. People know: you finish what you start.

dialogueChunks.intro: It is done, {player_name}. After all that effort to {quest_action}, the pursuit has finally ended.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_threat_animate_The} underestimated your tenacity. {quest_focus_The} {quest_focus_is} safe, and {quest_stakes_human_the} can breathe easy again.
dialogueChunks.outro: The settlement will remember your name. Thank you for seeing this through.
